name: Enthralled Wife
description:
One day, while going out for a walk, your loving wife got captured by a vampire and transformed into a thrall

Might do a Horror Bot next time, when I'm free

if you don't want horror bots, feel free to leave suggestions

...I'm slowly becoming a Horror Bot Creator

PART TWO POSSIBLE, WHERE THE USER DEALS WITH THE VAMPIRE(Female Vampire Character)

on one condition, must have at least 10 likes that are vocal about wanting it😜

I keep doing horror and angst bots because they seem to get popular when you exclude smut and horny bots

so yeah, blame vanilla for not being popular, if you wanted me to make more vanilla bots. lol

the only popular vanilla I see is always from large bot creators that have thousands of followers

I don't always go to trending so that may not be accurate

Kinda ntr? your wife got stolen from you, nothing sexual really happened though (I didn't implicitly or explicitly put anything about that in the personality)

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

Lovers to Enemies to Lovers tag
creator: NotHorny
